<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1beta1/system/cluster-config/refresh"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Refresh the single ClusterConfig resource. Refreshing enqueues
the resource for reconciliation by its corresponding controller.

  parameters={undefined}
